Source URL: https://www.apexaccelerators.us/

# APEX Houston 77084 URL catalog for BOSS routing

Review date: 2026-06-28
Primary geography: Houston area, ZIP 77084 example.

## Primary APEX pages
- APEX Accelerators national site - https://www.apexaccelerators.us/ - national entry point, locator, APEX explanation, and Native American APEX map route.
- SBA federal contracting assistance - https://www.sba.gov/local-assistance/federal-contracting-assistance - explains APEX Accelerators as a contracting technical-assistance resource.
- UH APEX homepage - https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/APEX/default.asp - Houston-area APEX entry point.
- UH APEX services - https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/APEX/Services.asp - services, counties served, consulting, training, registrations, certifications, market research, solicitation assistance.
- UH APEX eligibility - https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/APEX/Program_Eligibility.asp - eligibility rules for formed, for-profit businesses in service area.
- UH APEX request counseling - https://apex.uhbauer.org/reg.aspx?center=71011&mode=counsel&subloc= - client registration and counseling request.
- UH APEX training - https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/APEX/Training.asp - live events, on-demand webinars, speaker request.
- UH APEX event catalog - https://apex.uhbauer.org/center.aspx?center=71011 - current and on-demand training catalog.
- UH APEX FAQs - https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/APEX/FAQs.asp - contracting basics, SAM, certification, opportunity search.
- UH APEX contact - https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/APEX/Contact_Us.asp - address, phone, email.
- UH APEX location map - https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/APEX/Location_Map.asp - location, parking, accessibility.

## UH APEX government-resource pages
- Government resources overview - https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/APEX/Government_Resources.asp - federal, state, and local sections.
- Federal government links - https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/APEX/Federal_Government.asp - SAM, SBA, 8(a), WOSB, HUBZone, VA Vets First, NAICS, PSC, FAR, GSA, FPDS, USAspending, and more.
- State government links - https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/APEX/State_Government.asp - Texas Comptroller, Vendor Information Center, CMBL, ESBD, HUB program, NIGP, DIR, MD Anderson.
- Local government links - https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/APEX/Local_Government.asp - City of Houston, OBO, Houston Airport System, Harris County, METRO, Port Houston.
- CMMC resources PDF - https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/images/apex/Website%20Document/CMMC%20Resources.pdf - DoD cybersecurity, CMMC, NIST, SPRS, Project Spectrum, CISA, DCISE links.
- Disaster recovery contracting - https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/APEX/Disaster_Recovery_Contracting.asp - disaster contracting guide and quick reference.

## UH Texas Gulf Coast SBDC pages
- UH SBDC homepage - https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/default.asp - network entry point.
- Find Your SBDC - https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Find_Your_SBDC.asp - locator by ZIP or county.
- SBDC locations - https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Locations.asp - center directory and service areas.
- Houston Center SBDC - https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Houston_Center_SBDC.asp - Central and North Harris County.
- Fort Bend County SBDC - https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Fort_Bend_County_SBDC.asp - Fort Bend, Matagorda, Wharton.
- Fort Bend advising - https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Fort_Bend_County_SBDC_Advising.asp - Fort Bend and Southwest Harris County.
- SBDC business advising - https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Consulting1.asp - free one-on-one advising.
- Browse resources - https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Browse_Resources.asp - Start, Grow, Marketing, AI, Cybersecurity, Manufacturing, International Trade, Government Jumpstation, Disaster Preparedness.
- Start your business - https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Start_Your_Business.asp - startup resource route.
- Financing - https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Financing.asp - financing readiness and grant guardrails.
- Marketing resources - https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Marketing_Resources.asp - market research, marketing plan, SBDCNet, Vertical IQ.
- AI business resources - https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/AI_Business_Resources.asp - AI resource guide, webinars, classes, quick-start guide.
- AI FAQs - https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/AI_FAQs.asp - responsible AI in advising.
- Cybersecurity - https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Cybersecurity.asp - cyber one-pagers and federal cyber links.
- Manufacturer resources - https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Manufacturer_Resources.asp - manufacturing support hub.
- International trade - https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/InternationalTrade.asp - export and trade assistance.
- Government Jumpstation - https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Government_Resource.asp - government contracting and certification route.
- Disaster preparedness - https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Prepare.asp - business continuity and preparedness.
- Business recovery after disasters - https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/business-recovery-after-disasters.asp - post-disaster recovery.
- SBDC training - https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Training.asp - training index.
- SBDC webinars - https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/webinars.asp - live and recorded webinars.

## SCORE pages
- SCORE national site - https://www.score.org/ - mentoring, resources, education.
- SCORE Houston - https://www.score.org/tx/houston/ - local Houston mentoring and workshops.
- How SCORE mentoring works - https://www.score.org/how-mentoring-works/ - mentor matching and ongoing sessions.
- SCORE mentor request - https://score.tfaforms.net/111 - mentor request route.
- SCORE startup business plan template - https://www.score.org/templates/business-plan-template-a-startup-business/ - plan template and mentor review route.
